properties.displayName: Enforce Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) Managed Identity
properties.description: Audits or denies Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) clusters that explicitly configure service principal credentials instead of managed identity. This policy evaluates servicePrincipalProfile.clientId when present and treats non-'msi' values as noncompliant.

metadata.changeReason: Use explicit service-principal detection only. Portal and default MI-based create flows may omit servicePrincipalProfile in request payloads; omission is not treated as noncompliant.
metadata.complianceIntent: Flag or block clusters that explicitly set non-msi servicePrincipalProfile.clientId values while allowing managed-identity default provisioning paths.

metadata.description: Deny, Audit or Disabled the execution of the Policy
